summary: Frontend e2e for Workspaces (full CRUD + admin gating) and OrgSettings (admin edit + worker read-only). All 9 scenarios passed end-to-end. Edit/Delete/+New buttons render with correct data-testids, create/edit/delete dialogs work, toasts surface correctly, backend 400 'Cannot delete — N user(s) assigned…' message appears in toast when deleting Newcastle Depot, worker correctly sees read-only banner with no action buttons, and Org PATCH persists across reload.

issues: Seeded workspaces (Newcastle Depot, Sydney Metro) have no Description and no address text; both render '—'. Neither is flagged default_for_org, so the Default star badge is never exercised by seed data. Cosmetic / seed-data only — UI is correct.

critical_code_review_comments: Workspaces.jsx and OrgSettings.jsx are both well-structured, use api/apiError, surface backend detail in toasts (apiError pulls response.data.detail) and gate writes by getUser().role==='admin'. No issues found.
OrgSettings PATCH drops empty contact_email before submit — good defensive handling against backend EmailStr 422.
Worker view of /app/settings/org disables inputs AND hides save button — defence-in-depth is correct (backend also enforces admin-only).
seed_data_creation: Org ABN was set to '12345678901' during the admin save test (was empty before). Org name was restored to original 'Paneltec Civil Pty Ltd'. The Test Depot workspace was created → renamed → deleted, so no leftover workspace rows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Workspaces full CRUD + admin gating verified end-to-end. Backend already smoke-tested by main agent. If a future iteration touches /app/settings/workspaces or /app/settings/org, this Playwright flow (login admin → create/edit/delete workspace → attempt delete Newcastle for 400 toast → worker readonly banner check on both pages) is the canonical regression. The ABN field on the Paneltec Civil org is currently '12345678901' (set during this test); reset to '' if needed.

evidence.delete_with_users_toast: Cannot delete — 6 user(s) assigned. Reassign them in Settings → Users first.
